footer_body: This website contains forward-looking statements within the meaning of Section 27A of the Securities Act of 1933 and Section 21E of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934. Words such as "believe," "expect," "anticipate," "intend," "plan," "should," "may," "will," "estimate," "project," and similar expressions are intended to identify forward-looking statements.

These statements include, but are not limited to, statements regarding the pending acquisition of OTCHealth Inc. by Ainnova Tech Inc. and InnerScope's expected equity and profit-participation rights; the transition of retail relationships and day-to-day sales operations; InnerScope's continuing focus on hearing-technology research, development, and commercialization; future product launches; and any forecasts of revenue, profitability, or market opportunity.

InnerScope is a smaller reporting company whose common stock trades on the OTC market and is currently characterized as a "penny stock." Because of this, the safe-harbor provisions of the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995 may not apply to forward-looking statements made by the company. Investors are cautioned that actual results could differ materially from those projected, including as a result of risks related to: (a) the closing of the announced Ainnova / OTCHealth transaction on the contemplated terms or at all; (b) the successful operational transition of retail relationships and continuing realization of the company's equity and profit-participation rights; (c) reliance on a limited number of large retailers in historical operations; (d) the regulatory environment for over-the-counter hearing aids and related medical devices; (e) competition from larger consumer-electronics and medical-device companies; (f) the company's capital structure, capacity to raise additional financing, and potential dilution to existing shareholders; (g) liquidity and market-maker dependency typical of OTC and penny-stock securities; and (h) other risks identified in the company's disclosures filed with OTC Markets.

Stock-quote information presented on this site is sourced from third-party providers and may be delayed; real-time quotes for OTC securities may not be available without a paid OTC Markets data subscription. Information on this site is provided for informational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice, an offer to sell securities, or a solicitation of an offer to buy securities. Investors should consult their own financial, legal, and tax advisors before making investment decisions.
InnerScope undertakes no obligation to update any forward-looking statement except to the extent required by law.
short_callout: This section contains forward-looking statements. See important disclaimers in the footer.
quote_delay: Quotes shown are sourced from third-party providers. Real-time quotes for OTC securities, including INND, may not be available without a paid OTC Markets data subscription. Where data is delayed, the delay period is disclosed adjacent to the quote. Consult OTCMarkets.com and your broker for execution-grade pricing.
